long_summary: It looks like the file you uploaded is too large for me to read, so I wasn’t able to see any of its contents. But I can still help you make it “more free”—I just need to understand what you mean by “more free.”
key_points: It looks like the file you uploaded is too large for me to read, so I wasn’t able to see any of its contents. But I can still help you make it “more free”—I just need to understand what you mean by “more free.”
